description: Authoritative source of truth for content ownership. Each session claims its batch by setting status='in-progress' and owner='<session-label>' for its subjects, then sets status='done' with doneAt when finished. Never touch subjects outside your claimed batch.

statusLegend.in-progress: A session is currently working on this subject.
statusLegend.done: Content file exists and meets the minimums in _style.md.
statusLegend.review: Written but flagged for a human to check.

B01-mathematics.note: Mathematics on its own — it has the most topics (12) and the highest expectations.

B04-humanities.note: History, literature, philosophy, religion, architecture, art, music.

B05-social-world.note: The social sciences and the study of language / culture.

B06-tech-and-code.note: Computing, AI, security, games, robotics, data. Modern literacies.

B07-trades-I.note: Core building trades. Half the Trades category.

B08-trades-II.note: Mechanical and specialized trades. The other half.

B09-kitchen-arts.note: Cooking, baking, butchery, fermentation, cheesemaking, and drinks.

B10-handcrafts.note: The slow arts — things made by hand over time.

B11-life-skills-I.note: Indoor / interpersonal life skills. Money, body, people, time.

B12-life-skills-II-outdoor.note: Outdoor and household life skills. Hands-on, practical.

B15-nature-and-games.note: Outdoor observation, field pursuits, and a couple of strays (chess, etiquette).

math.note: 10 topics completed (algebra, geom, trig, precalc, calc2, diffeq, stats, linalg, discrete, numtheory); 2 exemplars (arith, calc1) preserved. All URLs verified 2026-04-22.

physics.note: 8 topics (mechanics, em, thermo, waves, quantum, relativity, particle, cosmology). All URLs verified 2026-04-22; Feynman Lectures caltech.edu returns 403 to automated fetches but the site is known-good (already used in math.js exemplar).

chemistry.note: 6 topics (atoms, bonds, reactions, acidbase, organic, biochem). All URLs verified 2026-04-22.

astronomy.note: 5 topics (solar, stars, galaxies, bigbang, blackholes). EHT/eventhorizontelescope.org returns 403 to automated fetches, so replaced with ESO press-release and image-archive URLs. All other URLs verified 2026-04-22.

geology.note: 5 topics (plates, rocks, volcanoes, deeptime, fossils). All URLs verified 2026-04-22.

biology.note: 6 topics (cell, genetics, evolution, ecology, neuro, anatomy). All URLs verified 2026-04-22.

medicine.note: 3 topics (physiology, pharmacology, public_health). Educational tone — no clinical advice. All URLs verified 2026-04-22.

psychology.note: 4 topics (cognition, development, clinical, social_psych). Replication-crisis caveats noted for Zimbardo, social priming, and Milgram. All URLs verified 2026-04-22.

history.note: 13 topics (prehistory, mesopotamia, egypt, greece, rome, medieval, islam, renaissance, exploration, enlightenment, industrial, ww, coldwar). Enhanced 2026-04-23: inline interactive widgets (timeline, cuneiform, arch-compare, perspective), Wikimedia Commons image blocks (Parthenon, Pantheon, Vitruvian Man, Chartres, Mezquita, Lascaux, pyramids, Versailles, Berlin Wall, and others), and hidden-menu video shelves (5-6 additional curated videos per topic behind the Show-more disclosure). URLs verified.

literature.note: 8 topics (readclose, narrative, poetics, rhetoric, epic, shakespeare, novel, world_lit). Enhanced 2026-04-23: inline meter-scanner and gilgamesh-tablet widgets, First Folio and flood-tablet images, 5+ hidden-menu videos per topic.

philosophy.note: 7 topics (ethics, epistemology, metaphysics, logic, greeks, eastern, modern_phil). Enhanced 2026-04-23: inline trolley, ship-of-theseus, and syllogism widgets; 5+ hidden-menu videos per topic.

religion.note: 3 topics (abrahamic, dharmic, myth). Pluralism rule enforced. Enhanced 2026-04-23: inline world-religions-affiliation widget, 5+ hidden-menu videos per topic (Religion for Breakfast, Let's Talk Religion, Open Yale, Harvard edX).

architecture.note: 3 topics (arch_history, structural, urban_design). Enhanced 2026-04-23: inline Brunelleschi-dome-construction, arch-compare (Roman vs Gothic), and Manhattan-1811-grid widgets; Florence Duomo image; 5+ hidden-menu videos per topic.

art.note: 7 topics (cave_to_cath, renart, modern_art, drawing, color, composition, design). Enhanced 2026-04-23: inline perspective, color-wheel, and rule-of-thirds widgets; Masaccio's Tribute Money image; 5+ hidden-menu videos per topic (Smarthistory, Nerdwriter1, The Art Assignment, Great Art Explained).

music.note: 6 topics (notation, harmony, counterpoint, classical, jazz, popular). Theory + listener's angle paired. Enhanced 2026-04-23: inline chord-builder, circle-of-fifths, fugue-voices, and sonata-form widgets; 5+ hidden-menu videos per topic (12tone, Adam Neely, Inside the Score, Polyphonic, JALC). Registered B04 widgets in content/interactives-b04.jsx; post-bootstrap splicing in content/b04-enhance.js.

sociology.note: 4 topics (institutions, class, culture, deviance). Non-partisan framing; named schools of thought. URLs verified 2026-04-22.

economics.note: 3 topics (micro, macro, behavioral_econ). Keynes/Hayek framed as live debate; behavioral-replication caveats noted. URLs verified 2026-04-22.

politics.note: 3 topics (governments, constitutions, ir). Non-partisan; Churchill quote included for the democratic tradeoff. URLs verified 2026-04-22.

law.note: 3 topics (contract_law, criminal, constitutional). Uses Oyez for cases and Cornell LII for doctrine per batch note. URLs verified 2026-04-22.

linguistics.note: 3 topics (phonetics, syntax, etymology). Uses Lingthusiasm and The Ling Space per batch note. URLs verified 2026-04-22.

geography.note: 5 topics (climate, biomes, cities, cartography, geopolitics). Cartography + geopolitics cross-link. Climate tightly scoped to stay out of geology's lane. URLs verified 2026-04-22.

cs.note: 8 topics (programming, algorithms, datastructures, os, networks, databases, ai, crypto). All URLs verified 2026-04-22.

ai_craft.note: 2 topics (prompts, limits). Time-sensitive subject — resources pinned to 2024–2026. All URLs verified 2026-04-22.

security.note: 2 topics (passwords, threats). Cites NIST SP 800-63B, OWASP Top 10 (2025), Verizon DBIR (2025). All URLs verified 2026-04-22.

robotics.note: 2 topics (sensors, control). Feedback Systems book URL now on fbswiki (redirected from fbsbook.org). All URLs verified 2026-04-22.

carpentry.note: v3 scaffolded self-contained lessons. 5 topics rebuilt with: Whole idea / Before you start (tools + safety + words to know) / 3-5 sub-skills each with Worked-example and Common-mistake asides / Troubleshooting / Going deeper / Practice-this-week / Self-check / First project callout. 30-44 body blocks per topic. All v2 resources preserved (images, video IDs, Library drawer).

plumbing.note: v3 scaffolded self-contained lessons. 3 topics (pipe_types, dwv, fixtures) with worked examples for sweating copper, crimping PEX, solvent-welding PVC, sizing drains, roughing in a toilet. Practice and self-check on every topic.

electrical.note: v3 scaffolded self-contained lessons. 3 topics (ohms, wiring, code) with worked examples for Ohm's-law math, wiring a mid-run outlet, NEC ampacity lookups. Practice-this-week and self-check on every topic.

welding.note: v3 scaffolded self-contained lessons. 3 topics (mig, tig, stick) with settings worked-examples and common-mistake asides (too fast, dipped tungsten, long arc).

masonry.note: v3 scaffolded self-contained lessons. 3 topics (brick, block, stone) with worked examples for brick lead layout, CMU wall construction, dry-stone three-over-one rule. Practice on scrap walls.

hvac.note: v3 scaffolded self-contained lessons. 3 topics (refrigeration, ductwork, thermostats) with superheat/subcooling examples, static-pressure math, thermostat-wiring walkthroughs, EPA 608 as first project.

roofing.note: v3 scaffolded self-contained lessons. 2 topics (shingles, flashing) with worked examples for starter-course layout, step-flashing overlap, kickout placement. OSHA 1926 Subpart M fall-protection emphasized.

automotive.note: 3 topics (engine_basics, brakes, diag). All URLs verified 2026-04-22; YouTube channel pages and individual videos return an empty body to WebFetch but verified via search-result metadata. ChrisFix / Engineering Explained / ScannerDanner channel URLs are real.

machining.note: 3 topics (lathe, mill, tolerances). All URLs verified 2026-04-22; Abom79 / This Old Tony / Blondihacks YouTube channel URLs are real but return empty to WebFetch.

locksmithing.note: 2 topics (pin_tumbler, picking). Ethics-first framing. No Starch Locksport book page returns 403 to WebFetch but the book exists (nostarch.com/locksport). TOOOL US link verified.

painting_trade.note: 2 topics (prep, application). Fine Homebuilding article URLs return 403 to WebFetch but the domain and content are real.

flooring.note: 2 topics (hardwood, tile). All URLs verified 2026-04-22; Fine Homebuilding article URLs return 403 to WebFetch but the domain and content are real (cited cautiously). TCNA Handbook publisher page verified.

diesel.note: 2 topics (diesel_basics, ecu). All URLs verified 2026-04-22; Adept Ape / Diesel Laptops / ScannerDanner channel pages return empty to WebFetch but are real.

smallengine.note: 2 topics (carb, tuneup). All URLs verified 2026-04-22; Briggs & Stratton, donyboy73, and Steve's Small Engine Saloon channels are all real.

cooking.note: 4 topics (knife, heat_transfer, seasoning, stocks). Leans on McGee, Nosrat, Kenji López-Alt, Chef John, Adam Ragusea, Babish. All URLs verified 2026-04-23. seriouseats.com and nytimes.com return 403 to WebFetch but are known-good; cited sparingly.

baking.note: 3 topics (bread, cookies, sourdough). King Arthur Baking, Tartine, Forkish, The Perfect Loaf, The Bread Code. All URLs verified 2026-04-23.

butchery.note: 2 topics (primals, boning). Treats the trade with respect; no graphic content. Bryan Mayer, Bon Appétit Handcrafted, Fleishers/Applestones, Ryan Farr, Tom Mylan. All URLs verified 2026-04-23.

fermentation.note: 2 topics (lacto, vinegar). Built around Katz (Wild Fermentation, Art of Fermentation) and Brad Leone's It's Alive as batch prompt specified. wildfermentation.com returns 403 to WebFetch but the site is canonical. All other URLs verified 2026-04-23.

cheesemaking.note: 2 topics (fresh_cheese, aged). Ricki Carroll (New England Cheesemaking), Gianaclis Caldwell, Neal's Yard Dairy, Percival's Reinventing the Wheel. All URLs verified 2026-04-23.

coffee.note: 3 topics (beans, roasting, brewing). James Hoffmann heavy (per batch prompt), with Scott Rao, SCA, and Specialty Coffee Association as canonical references. All URLs verified 2026-04-23.

wine.note: 2 topics (varietals, tasting). Jancis Robinson, Court of Master Sommeliers (per batch prompt), WSET, and Somm documentary. All URLs verified 2026-04-23.

cocktails.note: 2 topics (classics, technique). Embury, Wondrich's Imbibe!, Dave Arnold's Liquid Intelligence, DeGroff. Educated Barfly, Cocktail Chemistry, Anders Erickson for YouTube. Difford's Guide for reference database. deathandcompanyworld.com returned ECONNREFUSED to WebFetch; Death & Co book URL verified via Penguin Random House instead. All other URLs verified 2026-04-23.

bbq.note: 2 topics (smoke, styles). Franklin, Meathead Goldwyn (AmazingRibs), Chef's Table: BBQ (Netflix), Raichlen. Regional styles grounded in Wikipedia's well-cited state articles. All URLs verified 2026-04-23.

pastry.note: 2 topics (lamination, custards). Ruhlman's Ratio (per batch prompt), Bo Friberg, Claire Saffitz (clairesaffitz.com redirects to dessertperson.com; used canonical redirect target), Michel Suas, SFBI. All URLs verified 2026-04-23.

finance.note: 3 topics (budgeting, investing, taxes). Plain Bagel + Ben Felix + Two Cents (PBS) channels per batch note. I Will Teach You to Be Rich + Random Walk Down Wall Street + Intelligent Graham + Bogle classic. IRS.gov + CFPB + investor.gov + Berkshire shareholder letters. Khan Academy personal-finance + Yale Open Course (Shiller). Warm life-skills tone.

nutrition.note: 2 topics (macros, micronutrients). Healthcare Triage (Aaron Carroll) + Nutrition Made Simple (Gil Carvalho) + Physionic. Pollan In Defense of Food + Greger How Not to Die + Bikman Why We Get Sick. Harvard Nutrition Source (URL canonical: nutritionsource.hsph.harvard.edu) + dietaryguidelines.gov + NIH Office of Dietary Supplements. Lind 1753 scurvy treatise as primary.

firstaid.note: 3 topics (cpr, wounds, choking). Safety caveats in every lesson — explicit 'this is not training' callouts and Red Cross / Stop the Bleed / St John Ambulance course recommendations per batch note. Hands-Only CPR (AHA, Vinnie Jones BHF), ACS tourniquet video, St John Ambulance choking videos. Wiseman SAS, Auerbach Wilderness Medicine, NOLS, Hesperian Where There Is No Doctor.

parenting.note: 2 topics (attachment, stages). Schools of thought named (behaviorist Kazdin vs relational Lansbury/Becky Kennedy) without taking sides per batch note. Bowlby Secure Base + Perry Boy Raised as Dog + Gopnik Gardener and the Carpenter. Harvard CDC + ZERO TO THREE + Yale Everyday Parenting (free Coursera). Tronick Still Face video as canonical.

negotiation.note: 2 topics (interests, batna). Getting to Yes (Fisher/Ury/Patton) + Never Split the Difference (Voss) + Bargaining for Advantage (Shell). HBR + PON Harvard + Voss long-form + William Ury TED. Coursera UMich Successful Negotiation + HBS Online Negotiation Mastery.

publicspeaking.note: 2 topics (structure, delivery). Talk Like TED (Gallo) + Made to Stick (Heath) + Resonate (Duarte) + Presentation Zen (Reynolds). Toastmasters Pathways + edX UW Public Speaking. Duarte TEDx Secret Structure of Great Talks + Treasure How to Speak as canonical videos. Talk_Like_TED has no Wikipedia page; cited via Gallo's Wikipedia entry.

timemgmt.note: 2 topics (priorities, deep_work). GTD (Allen) + 7 Habits (Covey) + Four Thousand Weeks (Burkeman) for priorities. Deep Work + Slow Productivity (Newport) + Flow (Csikszentmihalyi) for deep_work. Tim Urban TED + Newport TEDx + Knuth-on-email + paulgraham.com Maker's Schedule as primary essays.

cleaning.note: 2 topics (routines, stains). Consumer Reports How to Clean Practically Anything per batch note. Mendelson Home Comforts + Marie Kondo + KC Davis Struggle Care for the gentle/overwhelm angle. Clean My Space (Maker) + Go Clean Co (McAllister) + American Cleaning Institute videos. Stain-removal chart organized by four classes (protein/oil/tannin/dye).

carrepair.note: 3 topics (oil_change, tires, jumping). ChrisFix + Engineering Explained + Scotty Kilmer per batch note (channels return empty to WebFetch but verified via WebSearch). Sclar Auto Repair For Dummies + Muir VW book (cited via 'engineer' Wikipedia URL — there is no automotive_writer page) + Chilton/Haynes. AAA + NHTSA + Wikipedia for technical references.

gardening.note: 3 topics (soil, veggies, perennials). Self Sufficient Me (Valencia) + David the Good (Goodman) + Charles Dowding + Garden Answer + Monty Don/Gardeners' World per batch note. Rodale Encyclopedia + Teaming with Microbes + Darwin's worm book + Hessayon Expert series + Tallamy Bringing Nature Home + Christopher Lloyd Well-Tempered Garden + Oudolf Planting. RHS + UMN Extension + USDA Hardiness Zone Map. Seasonal note in chapterActivity per batch note.

composting.note: 2 topics (hot_comp, worm). Self Sufficient Me + David the Good + Charles Dowding for hot composting; Worm Farm Alchemy + Urban Worm Company + Self Sufficient Me for vermicomposting. Rodale Book of Composting + Howard An Agricultural Testament (full PDF on Soil and Health Library) + Jenkins Humanure + Appelhof Worms Eat My Garbage + Stewart Earth Moved + Edwards Vermiculture Technology. EPA + Cornell + NC State Extension + UMN. Spring/seasonal chapterActivity per batch note.

beekeeping.note: 2 topics (hive, seasons_bees). Beekeeping for Dummies (Blackiston) per batch note. Langstroth Hive and Honey-Bee + Seeley Honeybee Democracy + Sammataro Beekeeper's Handbook + Whynott Following the Bloom + Bush Practical Beekeeper. University of Guelph (Paul Kelly) + Frederick Dunn + Randy Oliver Scientific Beekeeping channels. Honey Bee Health Coalition Varroa Tools as primary management reference. Beesource.com redirects via tollbit subdomain — left out. Late-summer Varroa-monitoring chapterActivity.

sailing.note: 2 topics (points, tacking). Bowditch American Practical Navigator (free PDF from NGA, msi.nga.mil/Publications/APN) per batch note. Annapolis Book of Seamanship (Rousmaniere) + Slocum Sailing Alone Around the World + RYA Day Skipper Handbook + Melges Sailing Smart. Yachting Monthly (Tom Cunliffe) + RYA channel + Nautilus Sailing. US Sailing Basic Keelboat course. Summer/southwesterlies chapterActivity per batch note.

survival.note: 2 topics (priorities_survival, fire). Ray Mears + NOLS + Mors Kochanski + Coalcracker Bushcraft per batch note. SAS Survival Handbook (Wiseman) + Bushcraft 101 (Canterbury) + Deep Survival (Gonzales) + Kochanski Bushcraft. STOP acronym, Rule of Threes, ferro-rod first principles. Hypothermia and shelter-before-fire emphasized per batch note. Late-fall + October chapterActivities.

knots.note: 2 topics (essential, uses). Animated Knots by Grog (canonical web reference) per batch note. Ashley Book of Knots + Pawson Visual Guide + Klutz Book of Knots. By-activity index emphasized in 'uses' topic. HowNotToHighline for empirical breakage demonstrations. Mountaineering: Freedom of the Hills + On Rope (Smith/Padgett) for shock-load applications. Indoor-climbing-gym chapterActivity for winter season.

mapreading.note: 2 topics (topo, bearings). Free map sources cited per batch note: USGS topoView + USGS National Map + OpenStreetMap + CalTopo. Kjellström Be Expert with Map and Compass + Mountaineers Wilderness Navigation + NOLS Wilderness Navigation. REI + NOLS + Ordnance Survey channels. NOAA Magnetic Declination Calculator. Late-spring Harriman + summer Sterling Forest chapterActivities per batch note.

photography.note: 3 topics (exposure, composition_photo, light). Treats photographs as primary sources (Niépce's 1826 View from the Window, Cartier-Bresson, Saul Leiter). Adams trilogy (Camera/Negative/Print) included per batch note. Durable hosts (Wikipedia, worldcat, publisher pages, YouTube @handles).

film.note: 2 topics (shots, editing). Every Frame a Painting + Lessons from the Screenplay + StudioBinder + Nerdwriter as primary video channels per batch note. Murch In the Blink of an Eye + McKee Story. Porter's Great Train Robbery and Battleship Potemkin as primary performances.

theater.note: 2 topics (acting, directing). RSC + NT channels per batch note. Johnstone's Impro + Stanislavski An Actor Prepares + Meisner + Bogart A Director Prepares + Brook Empty Space as canon. Meiningen Ensemble framing for directing.

dance.note: 2 topics (ballet, social_dance). NYCB + Royal Ballet + Bolshoi channels per batch note. Homans Apollo's Angels + Vaganova + Frankie Manning autobio + Tango: Art History of Love (Thompson). Lincoln Center Midsummer Night Swing as chapter-style touchstone. Hellzapoppin' 1941 footage as primary source for Lindy Hop.

magic.note: 2 topics (card, misdirection). Penn & Teller Fool Us + Chris Ramsay + 52Kards channels per batch note. Darwin Ortiz's Strong Magic + Designing Miracles + Tommy Wonder Books of Wonder included per batch note. Erdnase 1902 + Vernon + Tamariz The Magic Way as primary canon.

stand_up.note: 2 topics (joke_structure, voice). Comedy Central + Just For Laughs archives per batch note. Vorhaus Comic Toolbox + Greg Dean + Judy Carter + Steve Martin's Born Standing Up. Pryor: Live in Concert (1979) and Gadsby's Nanette (2018) treated as primary performances per batch note.

djing.note: 2 topics (beatmatch, phrasing). Boiler Room + Cercle + Mixmag + DJ TechTools + Crossfader TV channels. Brewster & Broughton Last Night a DJ Saved My Life + How to DJ Right as canon. Grandmaster Flash Wheels of Steel + Larry Levan Paradise Garage bootlegs as primary.

yoga.note: 2 topics (sun_sal, breath). Yoga with Adriene as primary channel per batch note. Iyengar's Light on Yoga (and Light on Pranayama) as canon per batch note. First-month practice callout included (1-5 sun sals a day, 5 min nadi shodhana). Breath-practice safety caveats (kapalabhati contraindications, dizziness stop-signs). Patanjali Sutras as primary.

martial.note: 2 topics (striking, grappling). Ramsey Dewey as fact-checker per batch note. Sensei Seth + Liam Harrison + BJJ Fanatics + Bernardo Faria. First-month callout included (striking and grappling). Explicit CTE/head-trauma caveats for striking per batch note; ear/joint/infection caveats for grappling. Ali vs Liston (1964) + Gracie-Kimura (1951) as primary footage.

running.note: 2 topics (form, training). Strength Running (Jason Fitzgerald) + NN Running Team per batch note. Daniels' Running Formula + Born to Run + Anatomy for Runners included per batch note. First-month callout (4 days/wk + strides + metronome 175 bpm). Lydiard + Kipchoge Berlin 2022 as primary references. Endurance running hypothesis paper (Bramble/Lieberman 2004) cited.

climbing.note: 2 topics (technique_climb, safety). Magnus Midtbø + EpicTV Climbing + Lattice Training per batch note. Rock Climber's Training Manual (Anderson) + Self-Coached Climber + Freedom of the Hills as canon per batch note. First-month callout + explicit safety caveats (AAC Accidents, partner check, outdoor-mentor requirement). Brad Gobright 2016 framing for safety topic.

cycling.note: 2 topics (maintenance, riding). Global Cycling Network per batch note; Park Tool School as full free curriculum. Zinn (road + MTB) + Sheldon Brown + Bicycling Science as canon. First-month callout (3 skills in 3 weeks: flat, chain lube, derailleur). Maurice Garin 1903 Tour + Krabbé The Rider as literary frame.

birding.note: 2 topics (id, calls). Lesley the Bird Nerd, Cornell Lab, Merlin, Audubon, Sibley. Wikipedia URLs and Cornell resources verified 2026-04-23.

foraging.note: 2 topics (safety_forage, mushrooms). Safety framing front-loaded (rule of absolute certainty, NAMA-club apprenticeship). Sam Thayer, Adam Haritan, Michael Kuo. URLs verified; foragersharvest.com and namyco.org verified live.

fishing.note: 2 topics (knots_fish, flyfishing). Orvis Learning Center and Animated Knots verified. Walton on Gutenberg verified.

hunting.note: 2 topics (safety_gun, tracking). Safety/ethics front-loaded (Cooper's four rules, fair chase). NSSF, hunter-ed.com, Boone and Crockett verified. MeatEater and The Hunting Public per batch note.

astronomy_amateur.note: 2 topics (constellations, scope). Distinct from `astronomy` (hard science). Stellarium, lichess-style free tools, Dobsonian-first recommendation. AAVSO/DarkSky return 403 to automated fetches but are known-good. Turn Left at Orion per batch note.

meteorology.note: 2 topics (clouds, fronts). Luke Howard and Bergen School framing. UK Met Office learning portal, NOAA, Windy.com, earth.nullschool. MetMatt/MesoMatt per batch note. NOAA JetStream (noaa.gov/jetstream) returns 403 but is live.

chess.note: 2 topics (openings, endgame). Interactive chess_board widget does not exist — per batch note, omitted interactive and linked to lichess Studies instead. Agadmator, GothamChess, Naroditsky, Bartholomew. My 60 Memorable Games per batch note. Capablanca's Chess Fundamentals on Gutenberg (ebook 33870) verified.

etiquette.note: 2 topics (table, letters). Batch note cited *The Elements of Etiquette* but that title does not appear in the Emily Post catalog; substituted the current Centennial Edition (2022) and the 1922 Etiquette on Gutenberg. Flagging for human review so the batch note can be corrected or the substitution confirmed.
